summary: Backend testing complete for iteration 30: Download Links Refactor. All 21 tests passed. Verified: (1) No more Python-side dedup - total=15237 raw links returned, (2) Uploader info (uploader_username, uploader_role) added to each item, (3) Filter by uploader works (IMPERIUM=8951, Dimrost=1731), (4) New sorts profiles(username).asc/desc and quality.asc/desc work, (5) New /api/download-links/uploaders endpoint returns 9 uploaders (sorted, public), (6) /recent still deduplicates, (7) Security headers present, no credential leakage.
passed_tests: GET /api/download-links?limit=24 returns total=15237 (not deduplicated)

Items have all required fields: id, tmdb_id, media_type, ww_id, source_name, source_url, quality, resolution, language, release_name, season_number, episode_number, file_size, is_verified, created_at, submitted_by, uploader_username, uploader_role, title, poster_path
GET /api/download-links?uploader=IMPERIUM filters correctly - total=8951, all items have uploader_username=IMPERIUM
GET /api/download-links?uploader=Dimrost works - total=1731, all items have uploader_username=Dimrost
GET /api/download-links?uploader=NONEXISTENT returns empty list total=0
GET /api/download-links?sort=profiles(username).asc sorts uploaders A→Z
GET /api/download-links?sort=profiles(username).desc sorts uploaders Z→A
GET /api/download-links?sort=quality.asc sorts by quality ascending
GET /api/download-links?sort=quality.desc sorts by quality descending
GET /api/download-links?sort=invalid_sort defaults to created_at.desc
GET /api/download-links combining filters works (uploader=IMPERIUM + quality=FHD + media_type=tv)
Items without profile link show uploader_username='Anonyme' and uploader_role='user'
GET /api/download-links/uploaders returns list of 9 uploaders with {username, role}
GET /api/download-links/uploaders is PUBLIC (no auth required)
Uploaders list only contains profiles with role in ('uploader', 'admin')
Uploaders list is sorted by username alphabetically
GET /api/download-links/recent still works unchanged (still deduplicated for home slider)
No Supabase credentials (service_role key) leak in /api/download-links response body or headers
No Supabase credentials leak in /api/download-links/uploaders response
Security headers present on /api/download-links (X-Frame-Options=DENY, X-Content-Type-Options=nosniff)
Security headers present on /api/download-links/uploaders
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Supabase WWembed data (15237 total links)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 30 backend features validated: Download Links Refactor. Key changes: (1) GET /api/download-links no longer deduplicates - returns ALL 15237 links with pagination. (2) Each item now includes uploader_username and uploader_role from Supabase profiles table join. (3) New filter: uploader=username uses PostgREST inner join. (4) New sorts: profiles(username).asc/desc and quality.asc/desc. (5) New endpoint GET /api/download-links/uploaders returns 9 uploaders (admin, Dimrost, Dusty-Poulet, Hommeordinaire, IMPERIUM, kingkong, LadyFM, RedKetchup, Triskelion) with roles. (6) /api/download-links/recent still deduplicates for home slider. Uploader counts: IMPERIUM=8951, Dimrost=1731.
